summary: Testing of Hui Fenua new features completed successfully. All 4 features requested are working: Déconnexion button, Zoom controls, Translation FR/TAH, and Covoiturage category.

minor.issue: Rate limit (3/min) triggered during rapid testing - expected behavior for security

passed_tests: ✅ API: POST /api/translate - French to Tahitian translation works (bonjour → ia ora na)
✅ API: POST /api/translate - Tahitian to French translation works (mauruuru → merci)
✅ API: POST /api/translate - Empty text returns 400 error
✅ API: POST /api/translate - Invalid direction returns 400 error
✅ API: GET /api/translate/dictionary - Returns stats (199 French words, 232 Tahitian words)
✅ API: GET /api/translate/phrases - Returns 10 common phrases for learning
✅ API: GET /api/pulse/marker-types - Now includes 'carpool' type with #10B981 color
✅ API: GET /api/pulse/marker-types - All 9 types present (roulotte, accident, surf, event, webcam, weather, market, carpool, other)
✅ API: POST /api/auth/request-password-reset - Returns success with valid email
✅ API: POST /api/auth/request-password-reset - Invalid email format returns 400
✅ API: POST /api/auth/request-password-reset - Prevents email enumeration (returns success for unknown email)
✅ API: POST /api/auth/logout - Endpoint works and clears session
✅ API: POST /api/auth/logout-all - Requires authentication (401 without auth)
✅ API: GET /api/auth/me - Returns user data after login
✅ API: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/translate - Returns 404 for invalid post ID
✅ UI: Login works with user1@test.com credentials
✅ UI: Profile page - Logout button (Déconnexion) visible with data-testid='logout-btn'
✅ UI: Profile page - Logout button styled in red with proper hover states
✅ UI: Profile page - Edit button (Modifier) also visible
✅ UI: Feed page - 20 translate buttons found on posts (data-testid='translate-post-btn')
✅ UI: Feed page - Translation works - shows 'Traduit en Tahitien' toast notification
✅ UI: Feed page - 'Voir l'original' link appears after translation
✅ UI: Pulse page - Zoom In button (data-testid='zoom-in-btn') works
✅ UI: Pulse page - Zoom Out button (data-testid='zoom-out-btn') works
✅ UI: Pulse page - 'Ma position' button (data-testid='locate-me-btn') visible
✅ UI: Pulse page - Covoiturage filter visible in filter bar with car emoji 🚗
✅ UI: Pulse page - Covoiturage filter clickable and filters markers
✅ UI: Forgot Password page - Accessible at /forgot-password
✅ UI: Forgot Password page - Email input with data-testid='forgot-password-email'
✅ UI: Forgot Password page - Submit button with data-testid='forgot-password-submit'
✅ UI: Forgot Password page - Back to login link present

success_rate.backend: 94% (17/18 tests - 1 failed due to rate limiting which is expected)

mocked_apis.Resend Email: Password reset email sending via Resend API is MOCKED (no API key configured). Endpoint returns success but no actual email is sent.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Déconnexion button on ProfilePage.js line 119-131 - visible and styled in red, 2) Zoom controls on PulsePage.js lines 141-187 - zoom in/out/locate buttons working, 3) Translation FR/TAH via button in FeedPage.js lines 669-733 - shows toast on success, 4) Covoiturage category in fenua_pulse.py MARKER_TYPES - visible on UI with emerald color #10B981, 5) Forgot password at ForgotPasswordPage.js - form functional. Note: Backend was restarted to clear marker types cache so carpool type would appear.

logout_button.styling: Red text with red border, hover:bg-red-50
